summary: Matched and linked the item draw translation unit by refactoring src/melee/it/itdraw.c around it_8026EECC, updating itdraw.c from NonMatching to Matching in configure.py, and correcting related symbol metadata in config/GALE01/symbols.txt. The bot report records two new matches: it_8026EECC reaching 100.00% and itdraw .sdata reaching 100.00%.

key_files.role: Primary source match for it_8026EECC; replaced direct user_data loads with GET_ITEM in several helpers, collapsed conditional temporary pointer setup into ternary calls, extracted duplicated Camera_80031060 switch logic into it_8026EECC_inline_sw, and removed PAD_STACK(48).
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/it/itdraw.c hunks around it_8026EECC_inline_1/2/3/0 and it_8026EECC
text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report, 2 new matches

key_files.role: Changed the build configuration entry for melee/it/itdraw.c from NonMatching to Matching.
Adjusted symbol metadata near itdraw data: reduced it_804D5168 size from 0x8 to 0x4 and changed it_804DC6B0 from a global float symbol to local @275.

what_changed: Matched it_8026EECC according to the bot report, moving it from 99.41% to 100.00%.
Improved linked code by +2196 bytes and matched code by +1248 bytes according to the bot report.
Replaced several Item* ip = gobj->user_data uses with GET_ITEM(gobj) in it_8026EECC-related inline helpers and the main function.
Replaced new_pos temporary initialization and if-assignment blocks with direct conditional arguments: ip->xDCF_flag.b7 ? pos : NULL.
Extracted duplicated Camera_80031060 switch dispatch into static inline it_8026EECC_inline_sw.
Adjusted symbol metadata for it_804D5168 and it_804DC6B0/@275, with bot report showing itdraw .sdata reached 100.00%.

smart_moves.text: Factored two duplicated Camera_80031060 switch blocks into a single static inline helper, preserving the same case behavior while reducing repeated generated-looking control flow.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/it/itdraw.c addition of it_8026EECC_inline_sw and replacement call sites

smart_moves.text: Used GET_ITEM(gobj) for item user_data access in several places, making the item object access more idiomatic and typed than direct gobj->user_data use.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/it/itdraw.c replacements in it_8026EECC_inline_1/2/3/0 and it_8026EECC

smart_moves.text: Removed a stack-padding tactic after source refactoring made it unnecessary for the reported match.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report showing it_8026EECC at 100.00%

decomp_lessons.lesson: When duplicated switch dispatch blocks differ only by location, extracting them into a small static inline helper can both improve authored-source shape and support matching.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists it_8026EECC as 100.00%

decomp_lessons.lesson: For Item GObj access, GET_ITEM(gobj) can be a better matching/readability form than direct gobj->user_data in item code when the object is known to contain an Item.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: direct user_data loads changed to GET_ITEM(gobj)

decomp_lessons.lesson: A temporary pointer used only to pass either pos or NULL can sometimes be collapsed into a ternary call argument without harming the match.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: new_pos temporary removed and replaced by ip->xDCF_flag.b7 ? pos : NULL
text_corpus: bot report lists it_8026EECC as 100.00%

naming_conventions.name: it_8026EECC_inline_sw
naming_conventions.convention: Address-style function prefix retained with a descriptive suffix for extracted local switch dispatch.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/it/itdraw.c addition of static inline void it_8026EECC_inline_sw

naming_conventions.name: ip
naming_conventions.convention: Short local role name for Item* remains in use.
Unproven .sdata2 float ownership was represented as a local address-style label rather than a global semantic or address-style it_ symbol.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: PAD_STACK(48) was deleted from it_8026EECC while the bot report records the function as newly matched at 100.00%.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Inline-helper extraction for duplicated control flow
assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: Duplicated Camera_80031060 switch logic was moved into it_8026EECC_inline_sw and invoked from both original locations.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: it_8026EECC_inline_sw added and duplicate switch blocks removed

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Symbol metadata adjustment for data matching/linking
assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: Changed one .sdata symbol size and one .sdata2 symbol scope/name; the bot report records .sdata for main/melee/it/itdraw moving from 66.67% to 100.00%.

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR identity, state, author, changed file counts
raw_diff: complete diff for changed files
notes: The PR body is empty and there are no review comments, so author rationale and reviewer intent are not available.
The bot report provides match/link progress evidence, but the slice does not include raw objdiff output or local build logs.
Symbol metadata edits are visible in the diff, but the historical reasoning for exact size/scope changes is not stated.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Extract repeated camera switch dispatch into local inline helper
accepted_candidate_records.text: In itdraw's it_8026EECC, duplicated Camera_80031060 switch blocks were factored into it_8026EECC_inline_sw, contributing to a reported 100.00% function match.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Prefer GET_ITEM for known item GObj access
accepted_candidate_records.text: This PR replaced direct gobj->user_data item casts/accesses with GET_ITEM(gobj) in it_8026EECC helpers while achieving the reported match.

source_update_candidates.title: itdraw.c became Matching in PR 2609
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2609 changed configure.py so melee/it/itdraw.c is built as Object(Matching, "melee/it/itdraw.c").
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py NonMatching to Matching change
source_update_candidates.reason: This is a durable path/build-status fact, but should be curated against current source before promotion.

source_update_candidates.title: itdraw symbol metadata adjusted for it_804D5168 and @275
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2609 changed it_804D5168 size from 0x8 to 0x4 and changed it_804DC6B0 at .sdata2:0x804DC6B0 into local symbol @275.
source_update_candidates.reason: Symbol metadata ownership belongs in source/path facts after curator verification against current symbols.

source_update_candidates.title: GET_ITEM may be preferred over direct user_data for item objects
source_update_candidates.text: This PR provides another example where known Item GObj access was expressed with GET_ITEM(gobj) rather than direct gobj->user_data while matching.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential reinforcement of typed access/accessor guidance; should not be promoted globally without checking broader item-code convention.

rejection_notes: Do not infer a human reviewer preference: the slice contains no review comments.
Do not generalize that all gobj->user_data accesses should become GET_ITEM; the evidence is limited to known item access in itdraw.
Do not treat the exact symbol metadata edits as generally valid for other translation units without section ownership evidence.
